fullOutput:
<path>/home/user/code/nix-common.nix</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: # Shared Nix configuration for shell.nix and flake.nix
2: #
3: # This file ensures both environments have identical packages, environment
4: # variables, and shell hooks. The flake.lock provides exact version pinning.
5: #
6: # Usage in flake.nix:
7: #   nixCommon = import ./nix-common.nix { inherit pkgs; };
8: #
9: # Usage in shell.nix:
10: #   nixCommon = import ./nix-common.nix { inherit pkgs; };
11: 
12: { pkgs }:
13: 
14: {
15:   NIX_CONFIG = "extra-experimental-features = nix-command flakes ca-derivations";
16: 
17:   # Native build inputs (tools)
18:   nativeBuildInputs = with pkgs; [
19:     nix
20:     home-manager
21:     git
22:     sops
23:     ssh-to-age
24:     gnupg
25:     age
26:   ];
27: 
28:   # Additional packages
29:   packages = [
30:     (pkgs.python3.withPackages (
31:       python-pkgs: with python-pkgs; [
32:         pydbus
33:         dbus-python
34:         pygobject3
35:         dbus-python
36:       ]
37:     ))
38:   ]
39:   ++ [
40:     pkgs.gobject-introspection
41:     pkgs.glib
42:   ];
43: 
44:   # Shared shell hook for both nix-shell and nix develop
45:   shellHook = ''
46:     # Save devshell PATH, then source HM session vars (EDITOR, etc.)
47:     _devshell_path="$PATH"
48:     unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
49:     . "$HOME/.profile" 2>/dev/null || true
50:     # .profile prepends HM sessionPath entries to PATH — move devshell paths back to front
51:     # so devshell takes priority, with HM paths (e.g. ~/.local/bin) as fallback
52:     _hm_prefix="''${PATH%:$_devshell_path}"
53:     if [ "$_hm_prefix" != "$PATH" ]; then
54:       export PATH="$_devshell_path:$_hm_prefix"
55:     fi
56:     unset _devshell_path _hm_prefix
57: 
58:     echo "Welcome to the development shell!"
59:   '';
60: }

(End of file - total 60 lines)
</content>
